# Agros-98 AD

> Bulgarian agricultural processor and exporter specializing in oilseeds, hulled sunflower kernels, seed oils, seed flours, and seed tahinies. Family-owned company based in Suvorovo and Varna, Bulgaria. Supplies B2B buyers across Europe.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://agros98.com/): Company overview, product categories, and contact information
- [Products](https://agros98.com/products.html): Full product catalog — seeds, oils, flours, tahinies
- [Contact](https://agros98.com/contact.html): Sales and accounting contacts, company address

## Products

### Seeds & Kernels
- [Hulled Sunflower Kernels (Bakery Grade)](https://agros98.com/hulled-sunflower-kernels-bakery.html)
- [Hulled Sunflower Kernels (Confectionery Grade)](https://agros98.com/hulled-sunflower-kernels-confectionery.html)
- [Broken Sunflower Kernels](https://agros98.com/broken-sunflower-kernels.html)
- [Coriander Seeds](https://agros98.com/coriander-seeds.html)
- [Coriander Splits](https://agros98.com/coriander-splits.html)
- [Brown Flaxseed](https://agros98.com/flaxseed-brown.html)
- [Yellow Flaxseed](https://agros98.com/flaxseed-yellow.html)

### Oils
- [Sunflower Oil (Linoleic)](https://agros98.com/sunflower-oil-linoleic.html)
- [Sunflower Oil (High-Oleic)](https://agros98.com/sunflower-oil-oleic.html)
- [Coriander Oil](https://agros98.com/coriander-oil.html)
- [Flaxseed Oil](https://agros98.com/flaxseed-oil.html)
- [Pumpkin Seed Oil](https://agros98.com/pumpkin-oil.html)
- [Walnut Oil](https://agros98.com/walnut-oil.html)
- [Milk Thistle Oil](https://agros98.com/milk-thistle-oil.html)

### Flours & Proteins
- [Sunflower Flour](https://agros98.com/sunflower-flour.html)
- [Sunflower Protein](https://agros98.com/sunflower-protein.html)
- [Coriander Flour](https://agros98.com/coriander-flour.html)
- [Flaxseed Flour](https://agros98.com/flaxseed-flour.html)
- [Pumpkin Flour](https://agros98.com/pumpkin-flour.html)
- [Walnut Flour](https://agros98.com/walnut-flour.html)
- [Milk Thistle Flour](https://agros98.com/milk-thistle-flour.html)

### Tahinies
- [Sunflower Tahini](https://agros98.com/sunflower-tahini.html)
- [Flaxseed Tahini](https://agros98.com/flaxseed-tahini.html)
- [Pumpkin Tahini](https://agros98.com/pumpkin-tahini.html)
- [Walnut Tahini](https://agros98.com/walnut-tahini.html)

### Coriander
- [Coriander (category overview)](https://agros98.com/coriander.html)

## Languages

This site is available in English (default), Bulgarian (`/bg/`), and German (`/de/`).

## Company Details

- **Company:** Agros-98 AD
- **Location:** Suvorovo & Varna, Bulgaria
- **Sales contact:** Georgi Berbenkov — g.berbenkov@agros.net, +359 879 127 112
- **Office:** office@agros.net
